source: in-session Claude Code agent (pred-scout-coach) over data/omeda/heroes.json ability text only; every number ground-checked against the ability, failing lines dropped

wraith.E: Enter Camouflage to reposition or flee — takedowns reset the cooldown, so one kill can carry you across the fight.
wraith.LMB: Keep attacking between snipes — your rifle scales hard, and the sniper play works best woven between basic shots.
wraith.RMB: Snipe Marked targets: hitting them cuts the cooldown by 75%, so grenade first and shoot twice.
wraith.Q: Open with the grenade — the Mark reveals targets and adds bonus max-health damage to your next snipe.
wraith.R: Use it on a diver — after the delay they teleport back to where they stood 2s earlier, undoing the whole engage.
wraith.Passive: Plant the Sonar Drone at walls and bushes — it detects heroes through terrain, your personal anti-ambush tool.

wukong.LMB: Keep attacking through stance swaps — repeated hits are what spawn your clones, the real pressure.
wukong.RMB: Spirit dashes through targets; Body shoves them away — swap stances to choose between engage and peel.
wukong.Q: Spirit's cloud trail moves your whole team; Body's leap adds attack speed — pick the stance before committing.
wukong.E: Spirit spins for damage reduction into a 0.8s stun; Body slams harder from height — jump first for maximum impact.
wukong.R: Swap stances constantly — every 5 hits spawns a clone, and clones plus stance-cycling make you impossible to track.
wukong.Passive: Save the double jump to dodge skillshots, escape over terrain, or add height before Body's slam.

zinx.LMB: Poke the same target repeatedly — the stacking on-hit burn rewards focused hits far more than spread damage.
zinx.RMB: Save Infuse for wounded allies — it heals up to 40% more based on missing health — and it spikes during Triage Protocol.
zinx.Q: Throw Ricochet into groups: it bounces up to 5 times, stunning each new target — a teamfight opener from a support.
zinx.E: Place it where enemies must stand: it slows, then erupts 0.75s later for the bigger second hit.
zinx.R: Cast the Revival on the dive target before lethal damage lands — 4s of insurance that flips a lost fight.
zinx.Passive: Poke heroes to 5 stacks before your carry needs help — Triage Protocol boosts Infuse healing by 75%.

kallari.R: Save Guillotine as the finisher — it deals up to 2.5x damage based on missing health, so land your combo first.
kallari.LMB: Open from stealth with basic attacks to apply Death Mark, then flow into your combo.
kallari.RMB: Poke with daggers before committing — the 25% slow keeps targets in range, and two charges mean one is always ready.
kallari.Q: Enter Camouflage before rotations: 40% decaying speed carries you across the map unseen — steer around wards and enemy heroes.
kallari.E: Backflip to dodge danger, then dash a Death-Marked target for 2x damage — escape and commitment in one button.
kallari.Passive: Tag a target and disengage — the Mark detonates missing-health true damage by itself, and your extra jumps reach any flank.

grim-exe.LMB: Poke steadily and patiently — GRIM wins lanes by out-ranging and out-lasting, not by all-ins.
grim-exe.RMB: Read the enemy's key ability and block it — a successful block also refunds a chunk of your missing mana.
grim-exe.Q: In Assault Mode the blast lobs and shoves enemies from its center — use it to peel divers or displace defenders.
grim-exe.E: Sentry Mode farms and stacks attack speed; swap to Assault for 1650-range cleaving shots when sieges or fights demand reach.
grim-exe.R: Fire GTFO down clear lines — enemy heroes can body-block it — and use it to finish targets fleeing to safety.
grim-exe.Passive: Alternate ability and attack so each hit bursts Pulsefire — the true damage rewards mixing buttons, not spamming one.

the-fey.LMB: Poke lightly between plant casts — your spells do the work; attacks fill the space while cooldowns cycle.
the-fey.RMB: Throw it onto waves and held ground — half the damage ticks, half lands in the explosion, so keep enemies inside.
the-fey.Q: Zone with Bramble Patch — enemies touching it take damage and slow while allies inside gain 15% movement speed.
the-fey.E: Spam Nettles at the same target — repeat hits within 8s deal 20% more, stacking, and hero hits refund most of the mana.
the-fey.R: Hide the seedling in chokepoints or fights — the delayed pull-and-stun on every nearby hero is a teamfight reversal button.
the-fey.Passive: Fight near your kills — every takedown spawns a free Untamed Growth from the corpse plus 30% movement speed to chase.

lt-belica.Q: Aim the wave where enemies retreat — the delayed eruption knocks up and stuns for 1s, longer once maxed.
lt-belica.LMB: Poke in three-round bursts between abilities — Belica's real damage is her bombs, so use attacks to finish.
lt-belica.RMB: Place Void Bomb on the wave or under fighting enemies — every enemy hit refunds mana, keeping your rotation free.
lt-belica.E: Drop the drone into lane bushes or fights — it drains mana and zaps casters, starving ability-reliant enemies.
lt-belica.R: Ult mana-starved targets — the damage grows with their missing mana — and the 0.5s silence stops escape casts.
lt-belica.Passive: Max abilities deliberately — each maxed skill adds 10 Ability Haste and unlocks its Innovation upgrade.

khaimera.LMB: Never stop swinging — every hit feeds Rage, which speeds your cooldowns and keeps your regeneration flowing.
khaimera.RMB: Leap onto wounded targets — it deals up to 2x damage based on missing health — and use it to re-close after they dash.
khaimera.Q: Cast Unleash on top of a target and keep attacking — 5 max-speed swings that cleave nearby enemies for 75% damage.
khaimera.E: Hold Invigorate to cleanse the enemy's key stun — you heal a chunk of maximum health at the same moment.
khaimera.R: Channel Cull into a group: the 1.25s stun plus 6 hits deals heavy damage and refunds Rage per enemy hit.
khaimera.Passive: Stay above 50 Rage for the 8% movement speed — keep hitting something, since Rage decays after 2.5s of not attacking.

gideon.RMB: Poke down lanes with the comet: it explodes on the first hero hit, so aim at the target you want slowed by 35%.
gideon.Q: Drop the meteor where enemies are held or slowed — it only hits the impact area, so combo it after crowd control.
gideon.E: Save the portal for escapes or flanks, and remember teammates can follow through while it stays open for 5s.
gideon.R: Cast Black Hole once enemy lockdown is spent; after channelling 2.75s it cannot be cancelled, so survive that window first.
gideon.Passive: After any ability hit, land a basic attack — the tether damages over 2.1s and then Roots for 1s, setting up your meteor.
gideon.LMB: Weave basic attacks between spells — the bonus magical on-hit damage adds up across extended trades.

drongo.LMB: Keep firing — your critical strikes apply the bleed, so steady shooting quietly burns away max health.
drongo.RMB: Throw the boomerang so it returns through the same targets — both passes damage and slow, doubling its value near walls.
drongo.Q: Silence divers or channelers with the gas — up to 1.2s — and let the lingering cloud stack your bleed.
drongo.E: Activate before trades: your shots irradiate the target, then Old Rusty or Shrapnel Cannon detonates the stacks instantly.
drongo.R: Fire it into tanks for the 30% armor shred — or cast it mid-air to launch yourself backwards out of danger.
drongo.Passive: Build crit and keep casting — every critical strike and ability bleeds 2.25% of the target's maximum health.

iggy-scorch.RMB: Molotov the ground enemies must hold — the lingering Fire Field is the real damage, so zone with it.
iggy-scorch.Q: Keep up to 3 turrets alive around objectives and chokepoints, then Spew the target you want them all to burn.
iggy-scorch.E: Roll Oil Spill under enemies and ignite it with any fire ability — the 40% slow plus burn owns whole areas.
iggy-scorch.R: Inferno while walking forward — the movement speed lets you hose retreating enemies, and the ending belch knocks divers back.
iggy-scorch.Passive: Layer oil and fire: Slick-stacked enemies Ignite when your fire abilities touch them — slow first, burn second.
iggy-scorch.LMB: Spew a target to point every turret at them — your basic attack is a targeting tool as much as damage.

steel.LMB: Alternate light and heavy punches in trades — the heavy swing carries most of your damage.
steel.RMB: Lead with Shield Bash on tanks — the damage scales with the target's maximum health, and the 0.5s stun starts combos.
steel.Q: Charge through skillshots — you are Unstoppable during the dash — and knock divers away from your carry.
steel.E: Drop the wall between your carry and enemy shooters: it blocks all projectiles for 4s and punishes whoever walks through.
steel.R: Jump onto grouped enemies to knock them up and stun for 1.5s — the fight starter, best after their dashes are spent.
steel.Passive: Reset your shield by avoiding damage between trades — poke with the shield up, back off while it refreshes.

legion.LMB: Build penetration — every point adds 1.25% rifle damage — and pause firing briefly to let the magazine refill itself.
legion.RMB: Cook the grenade to shrink the fuse, but throw before the full 2.2s — it explodes in your hand if held.
legion.Q: Fire the payload at chokepoints and reactivate to deploy the 10 mines under enemies — a minefield on command.
legion.E: Plant the standard at the fight's center: allies heal and speed up for 8s, wards are revealed, and your ammo never runs dry.
legion.R: Lob the designator onto the backline — the beam tracks and prioritizes heroes for up to 9s, forcing them off the fight.
legion.Passive: Itemize deliberately — power, penetration, haste, and magical power each unlock a different ability upgrade at their threshold.

boris.Q: Sniff before pathing — ride the Scent Trail's movement speed to the Marked target, then hit them for the slow and a Canister.
boris.LMB: Attack constantly — every second hit banks a Canister, and full Canisters turn your swings into healing zaps.
boris.RMB: Dash through the whole wave or several heroes — each of the two swipes applies on-hit effects.
boris.E: Pop the Barrier as damage comes in and detonate late — the Fear grows up to 1s with Barrier duration.
boris.R: Line the dash carefully — it grabs the first hero you touch — then slam your target into your team's follow-up.
boris.Passive: Keep hitting heroes and monsters to hold max Canisters — the Tesseract Core's zaps and healing are your long-fight power.

phase.LMB: Add basic attacks to trades — a support who pokes forces enemies off the carry.
phase.RMB: Link whoever fights most, and save the reactivation Pull to yank them out of a death — Immobilized allies cannot be pulled.
phase.Q: Blast it when enemies face you — the Blind blanks their attacks, and hero hits drop your Blink cooldown to 1s.
phase.E: Channel the beam onto one diver: the stacking slow becomes a Root at 8 stacks — hold it until they commit.
phase.R: Save Hyperflux for your carry's big window: attack speed, ability haste, and huge decaying movement speed for 8s wins committed fights.
phase.Passive: Cast something whenever your partner is chipped — abilities heal you both — and use the cheap Blink aggressively for the 15% damage boost.

murdock.LMB: Keep firing steadily — every few hits loads the longer-range bonus shot from your passive.
murdock.RMB: Fire point-blank to shove divers away — the blast pushes harder up close and shreds 15% armor for follow-up shots.
murdock.Q: Trap jungle entrances and lane bushes: the 1.25s root turns any gank attempt into a kill for your side.
murdock.E: Activate to kite, and re-activate to stack attack speed up to 5 times; takedowns reset it, so keep fighting.
murdock.R: Snipe fleeing targets through anything — it ignores physical armor — but you kneel while aiming, so fire from safety.
murdock.Passive: Count your hits: after 5, save the 400-extra-range bonus attack to finish a retreating target or poke safely.

terra.LMB: Weave attacks between abilities to build Hersir stacks — every swing pushes you toward your next Empowered ability.
terra.RMB: Channel briefly before releasing — the first 1.25s grows range and damage — and dash through crowd control since you're Unstoppable.
terra.Q: Spin inside multiple heroes: each hero hit refunds 10% of the cooldown per strike; save the Empowered version for max-health damage on tanks.
terra.E: Throw it before committing — the 30% slow and 20% armor cut set up your dash; Empowered, it roots instead.
terra.R: Pop it when diving towers — it disables them and cleanses debuffs — or to shrug off lockdown mid-fight.
terra.Passive: Manage your 5 stacks: entering base refills them instantly, so leave with an Empowered ability ready, and fight under towers for extra armor.

skylar.RMB: Buy attack speed and save Hypercharge for committed fights — 10 attacks per second ignoring 20% of bonus armor melts targets.
skylar.Q: Stick the grenade first — the delayed blast and slow of up to 60% keep the target inside your Hypercharge stream.
skylar.E: Thrust upward when dived — hovering adds 100 attack range and bonus missiles, letting you shoot safely over the threat.
skylar.R: Save Atomiser for wounded heroes — it adds up to 25% of missing health — and fire down clear lines.
skylar.LMB: Steady shooting is the foundation — Skylar's kit turns attack speed into everything else, so keep firing.
skylar.Passive: Kill units near enemies — corpses explode, and hero corpses blast 3x harder — so fight inside the wave.

kira.RMB: Weave Mercy between basic attacks — it crits, lifesteals, and applies 3 Vengeance stacks toward your Dusk detonation.
kira.LMB: Attack relentlessly at one target — every hit stacks Vengeance, quietly amplifying all your damage on them.
kira.Q: Detonate Dusk after stacking Vengeance — the damage grows per stack, and kills reset the cooldown for chain clears.
kira.E: Use Shadow Glide to dodge — you are briefly Unselectable — and takedowns reset it, so reposition after every kill.
kira.R: Purge only when locked-down targets cannot leave — you cannot attack or cast during it, except Shadow Glide to reposition.
kira.Passive: Watch the Nevermore timer — spend the empowered shot on the healthiest target, since the Raven scales with current health.

maco.LMB: Attack four times to bank max stacks, then cast — the 1s cooldown refund keeps your gemstones cycling.
maco.RMB: Throw it from distance — the stun grows the further it travels, up to 1.3s at long range.
maco.Q: It heals allies or damages enemies — flick it at whoever needs it most; the max-health healing goes furthest on tanks.
maco.E: Jump onto an enemy hero — hitting one grants the shield, turning your engage into a tanky trade.
maco.R: Charge it fully down long lanes: the gemstone drags enemies along, and the end explosion stuns for up to 1.4s.
maco.Passive: Keep moving — at 25 stacks you gain Slow Immunity — so rotate and kite constantly instead of standing still to cast.

revenant.LMB: Track your magazine — the final round always crits, so line that shot up on the target that matters.
revenant.RMB: Reload manually between fights and end bursts with the final round — it adds missing-health damage and speeds you up.
revenant.Q: Mark with Scar first so the 10 missiles focus your target — otherwise they scatter to random enemies.
revenant.E: Open with Scar — Marked targets take bonus damage per hit, and consuming all 4 stacks Roots them for 1s.
revenant.R: Reckoning isolates the kill: drag the enemy carry into the Nether Realm with a fresh magazine and burst them alone.
revenant.Passive: Build crit and attack speed — both convert into physical power — and hunt kills for the growing bounty gold.

yin.RMB: Hold Backlash for enemy projectiles — the sphere reflects them at your target while shoving divers off you.
yin.Q: Whip to terrain to travel, or to a hero for the 90% slow — then steer the follow-up leap deliberately.
yin.E: Activate for 1100-range cleaving attacks, and protect your third-hit rhythm — it deals max-health damage and heals you.
yin.R: Pop Quelling Gale against shooters — enemy projectiles crossing it simply stop, letting you brawl safely inside.
yin.LMB: Keep attacking to hold your stacks — Yin's attack speed snowballs the longer she stays on targets.
yin.Passive: Hit multiple targets to stack faster — each stack adds attack speed up to 6 stacks, so never stand idle mid-fight.

argus.LMB: Poke with basic attacks between spells — they conserve the mana your homing barrage burns through.
argus.RMB: Hold the stream on one target — continuous projectiles stack your passive faster than anything else in the kit.
argus.Q: Open with Dread Nova — the stun of up to 1.2s guarantees the rest of your damage lands.
argus.E: Drop the Crystal on the fight's center: it shoves enemies off your allies, storms the area, then pulls them back in.
argus.R: Channel from far back — up to 5 beams that hit up to 150% harder on wounded targets — a fight-ending cleanup tool.
argus.Passive: Chain abilities quickly — hits within the 2s window stack Disintegration, and every stack makes the next hit meaningfully bigger.

mourn.LMB: Trade with basic attacks between casts — the empowered Extract swing makes the first hit of each exchange count.
mourn.RMB: Wind up from fog or behind minions — longer channels reach further, and the pull with its 90% slow sets up everything.
mourn.Q: Cast it in the middle of a brawl: allies get healing and armor while enemies take damage and lose theirs.
mourn.E: Channel longer for a longer Mesmerize — up to 1.2s — but you slow yourself, so start it as enemies commit.
mourn.R: Use Eclipse to start fights or escape: every enemy loses vision while you gain up to 80% movement speed.
mourn.Passive: Weave the empowered attack into every trade — it hits all targets and restores health, fueling your frontline sustain.

grux.LMB: Stack Bloodlust bleeds on enemies before committing to fights for consistent damage scaling.
grux.RMB: Use it on cooldown in duels — it applies on-hit effects twice and heals more the lower your health runs.
grux.Q: Channel longer for more range, then pull a carry out of position — the 0.75s stun confirms your follow-up.
grux.E: Save Stampede to drag a priority target back into your team, not just to close distance.
grux.R: Pop it in extended brawls: attacks steal physical power, and hitting fully-Bloodlusted heroes keeps extending the duration.
grux.Passive: Stack the bleed to 6 on one hero before committing — your ultimate lasts longer against fully-stacked targets.

bayle.LMB: Finish the attack chain — the final swing hits 2.5x — so enter trades with the chain already progressed.
bayle.RMB: Leap onto carries — the mark shreds their armor and grants 30% movement speed toward them, so you stick after landing.
bayle.Q: Land all 3 slashes on one target — the third knocks up and stuns, and the full set adds bleed damage.
bayle.E: Howl at the start of exchanges: the power and omnivamp fuel the trade, then the ending heal refunds damage you took.
bayle.R: Hold Kingslayer for a committed target — hitting a hero triggers the full 8-strike uppercut with max-health damage.
bayle.Passive: Plan trades around Berserk: dropping below 40% health powers you up, so fights that start badly can swing back.

morigesh.LMB: Dagger targets carrying Pestilence — each hit refreshes the burn, stretching your damage-over-time between casts.
morigesh.RMB: Mark a hero early — its hits heal you more per Pestilence stack, and killing units with it refunds half the cooldown.
morigesh.Q: Open with Hive — the 50% decaying slow makes everything else land — and use it to clear waves while roaming.
morigesh.E: Swarm through the enemy hero to refresh its full duration, healing off the pass-through damage while you chase or escape.
morigesh.R: Cast Curse once the rest of your damage has landed — it consumes the Mark, so make the burst count.
morigesh.Passive: Stack Pestilence with abilities, then keep it alive with daggers — the max-health burn is your quiet tank-killer.

muriel.LMB: Poke alongside your carry between shields — Muriel's orbs add real trade damage early.
muriel.RMB: Charge 1.1s when possible — the max-charge bolt Stuns instead of slowing — or cancel for the 50% refund.
muriel.Q: Drop it under your team in sustained fights: allies gain attack speed and healing while enemies inside lose attack speed.
muriel.E: Throw the shield ahead of the dive or the escape — the decaying movement speed makes it both a save and an engage tool.
muriel.R: Watch the whole map: shield the ally being dived — 35% damage reduction plus a shield — and land the knock-up on their attackers.
muriel.Passive: Lead with a damaging ability against healers — your spells cut enemy healing while allies you touch receive more.

greystone.LMB: Trade freely and often — Greystone's kit rewards long exchanges, and your sword swings anchor them.
greystone.RMB: Leap onto heroes or camp leaders — hitting one refunds 35% of the cooldown and speeds you up for the follow-up.
greystone.Q: Cast the whirlwind early in trades — the armor shred stacking up to 4 times makes everything after hit harder.
greystone.E: Empower the attack before engaging — the extended-range cleave slows everyone hit, starting or ending trades on your terms.
greystone.R: Use Stasis at low health — the heal grows up to 2.5x with missing health — then land the crash on clustered enemies.
greystone.Passive: Bait attacks into the periodic deflect, and remember your armor and regeneration climb as you get lower — you're strongest when hurt.

rampage.LMB: Keep swinging through long brawls — Rampage wins by staying in melee while his healing outlasts the enemy's damage.
rampage.RMB: Leap onto backliners and launch them toward your team; carry a boulder first so Pounce shatters it on landing.
rampage.Q: Hold the boulder while you approach — you have 5s — then throw point-blank for the easy stun of up to 1.4s.
rampage.E: Spam it in brawls: two hits with a 30% slow on a short cooldown, and its passive adds physical power.
rampage.R: Save Behemoth for when you are surrounded — the regeneration climbs 5% per nearby enemy hero, so diving deep heals more.
rampage.Passive: Fight around the Jungle — the regeneration doubles there — and trade while immobilized knowing the tenacity and healing kick in.

riktor.Q: Lead with Shock Therapy against shielded targets — it destroys the shield first, then damages and Silences for 0.8s.
riktor.LMB: Whip between abilities — the heavy scaling makes your basic attacks sting after every hook or silence.
riktor.RMB: Aim Riplash past minions at heroes — it attaches to the first enemy hit, so wait for a clear line before pulling.
riktor.E: Activate Electrocute before wading in — the shield, speed, and 4.5s damage aura reward standing in the middle of them.
riktor.R: Skewer Suppresses for 1.3s and deals its damage twice — use it to lock a carry while your team unloads.
riktor.Passive: Chain your crowd control — enemies you Immobilize or Silence have their cooldowns frozen, wasting their whole rotation.

sevarog.LMB: Swing between ability casts — hammer hits fill the gaps while Siphon cycles back off cooldown.
sevarog.RMB: Dash through the enemy team to Fear them for 1s — an engage-breaker and escape in one button.
sevarog.Q: Hit heroes with every Siphon — each connect steals a slice of their maximum health — and farm with it to build Souls.
sevarog.E: Drop it on fleeing or grouped enemies: leaving the zone means a 1.25s stun, so they eat damage or stand still.
sevarog.R: Use the knockback deliberately — peel divers off your carry or send an overextended enemy flying out of the fight.
sevarog.Passive: Farm Souls relentlessly with ability kills — each Tier at 40/80/120/160 Souls upgrades your tankiness and sustain.

shinbi.RMB: Hold the second charge: dash in with one, keep one to escape or chase after the trade.
shinbi.Q: Fire it down the lane through the whole minion wave — it pierces every target, so line enemies up for free poke.
shinbi.E: Cast it before trades: the shield and 20% decaying movement speed absorb the exchange while the circling wolves add damage.
shinbi.R: Cycle abilities to reach 8 Track stacks, damage several heroes to Mark them, then release wolves onto every Marked target at once.
shinbi.Passive: Time the empowered attack — at 2.5x damage it also applies Track and restores mana, so spend it on heroes, not minions.
shinbi.LMB: Attack between wolf casts — the bonus on-hit damage adds up, and the periodic empowered hit refunds mana.

kwang.RMB: Cast it while the blade sits in the world — it deals true damage at the blade's location, so fight inside that zone.
kwang.Q: Throw the blade to Tether enemies for 1.3s, then follow up — the tether holds them inside your combo.
kwang.E: Dash within range of your planted blade to recall it with a knock-up — and you are Unselectable during the dash.
kwang.R: With the blade planted behind enemies, ult to teleport onto their backline before the big slow lands.
kwang.Passive: Every ability hit Energizes the blade — weave basic attacks between casts to refund 0.5s of cooldown per stack.
kwang.LMB: Trade with basic attacks after every ability — the Energized lightning follow-ups carry Kwang's real damage.

twinblast.LMB: Both pellets apply on-hit effects at 55% — on-hit items work overtime, so just keep shooting.
twinblast.RMB: Hold 2 charges: slow a chaser with one, keep one to peel for yourself or secure a kill.
twinblast.Q: Line Vaporize through multiple enemies — it pierces and applies on-hit effects at 150% effectiveness, your biggest single button.
twinblast.E: Damage heroes constantly to refund the dash, then save it to hop out of trouble — it follows your movement direction.
twinblast.R: Ventilate melts targets who cannot leave — cast it after their dashes are spent, and attack speed adds bullets.
twinblast.Passive: Alternate ability then attack: every cast speeds you up and loads a triple shot — that weave is your whole rhythm.

aurora.LMB: Attack between spells — the bonus magical on-hit damage rounds out trades while your cooldowns cycle.
aurora.RMB: Sweep at close range — the initial hit slows, so the delayed eruption connects for the bigger damage.
aurora.Q: Dash to build ice walls your team can cross — cut off chases or open flanks with up to 45% movement speed.
aurora.E: Drop Hoarfrost under yourself when enemies dive — anyone touching the ring is Rooted for up to 1.2s.
aurora.R: Cryoseism the priority target — slow, then the 1s stun, then the explosion — and let your team unload during the freeze.
aurora.Passive: Double-jump to dodge and bait — the Replica even draws tower shots — and keep hitting to maintain Frost Storm.

dekker.E: Fence divers off your carry or wall a fleeing enemy in — the ring stops enemy heroes from crossing for its full duration.
dekker.LMB: Poke alongside your carry — Dekker's attacks are modest, so use them to finish targets your stuns hold still.
dekker.RMB: Throw Stasis Bomb from maximum distance — the stun grows up to 1.6s the further it flies.
dekker.Q: Sweep the beam through trades for the slow, then follow with the bomb while they are easy to hit.
dekker.R: Aim for Ion Strike's center — dead-center targets are Stunned instead of slowed — and cast it onto fenced or stunned enemies.
dekker.Passive: Cast abilities to refresh Rocket Boots, then double-jump to escape dives — nearby allies even gain 20% decaying speed.

akeron.LMB: Swing at everything — each hit feeds Hunger, marching you toward the Awakened state.
akeron.RMB: Bite point-blank — enemies close to you take 1.35x damage — and the heal grows 200% on kills, sustaining your clears.
akeron.Q: Fire the Eye ahead of a fight and pause it over enemies — the fireball rain slows them up to 35%.
akeron.E: Web terrain to hang above lanes for ambushes, or web a hero for the 1s Root — leaping down stuns.
akeron.R: Consume drags enemies into the bite — it Executes low-health targets and permanently banks maximum health for every execute.
akeron.Passive: Manage Hunger: hitting units and even taking hero damage feed it — 100 stacks Awakens your whole kit.

renna.LMB: Poke with basic attacks while drifting toward dying waves — collect Essence as you trade, not instead of trading.
renna.RMB: Fire the 3 piercing waves into lanes and fights — more Essence adds projectiles, so it scales into your main damage.
renna.Q: Throw the Soul Orb into grouped fights: it drags enemies in, heals you off its damage, and executes very low targets.
renna.E: Hold the orb to interrupt engages — launch it as divers commit and mesmerize them for up to 1.2s.
renna.R: Channel from safety, teleport onto the fight, and hug targets — the singularity fires every 0.5s at whoever is nearby.
renna.Passive: Hoover up Essence constantly — every ability scales with it — and jump mid-air to hover while raining spells.

gadget.RMB: Reactivate the droid above a hero — it follows them, ticking damage for 2.5s with a 20% slow, ideal before fights start.
gadget.Q: Stick the mine to a hero, then land a basic attack — the empowered explosion hits far harder.
gadget.E: Throw the gate behind fleeing enemies or across chases: allies gain 40% decaying speed, enemies who cross are Rooted for 1s.
gadget.R: Drop Tesla Dome on grouped enemies in tight spaces — it grows 60% larger and shreds magical armor with every damage tick.
gadget.Passive: Harass heroes with abilities and join kills — stacks permanently build magical power, so constant poke literally makes you stronger.
gadget.LMB: Land basic attacks on mined targets — attacks trigger the empowered Sticky Mine and finish what your damage-over-time softened.

adele.LMB: Trade with basic attacks freely — every swing carries bonus true damage that armor cannot blunt.
adele.RMB: Lash through the frontline — everyone hit is Rooted and you dash to the furthest target, landing on the backline.
adele.Q: Mesmerize divers with Royal Flourish and walk away with the 40% movement speed — or stay and land the true-damage slam.
adele.E: Cast Iron Rose mid-ability as damage comes in — the damage reduction absorbs the exchange while the vines keep ticking.
adele.R: Slam Queen's Garden onto grouped enemies — it interrupts abilities, Roots, grounds fliers, and punishes anyone who keeps moving inside.
adele.Passive: Keep tagging heroes — allies deal 6% bonus true damage to anyone carrying your Thorns, so hit before your team bursts.

zarus.LMB: Use basics to build Gladiator stacks and apply steady damage.
zarus.RMB: Quick-release within 0.2s for the cheap thrust and 60% refund; save the full throw for targets below 20% maximum health.
zarus.Q: Open Barricade into big damage — 75% reduction for 1.5s — then swing late for the bigger hit and 0.75s stun.
zarus.E: Dash to stick to targets — the attack speed lasts 3.5s — and cast it mid-air for the extra upward hop.
zarus.R: Ult targets you can finish: a kill during Coliseum permanently banks physical power, so treat it as a stat-stealing execute.
zarus.Passive: Stay in combat to hold 8 Gladiator stacks, and disengage deliberately — stacks falling off restore health per stack consumed.

crunch.RMB: Dash in Empowered to shove a target out of safety or into your team — otherwise save it to exit fights.
crunch.Q: Your spam button on the shortest cooldown — use it to trigger empowered punches and build toward Turbo.
crunch.E: Use the Empowered uppercut as your lockdown: the 0.75s knock-up interrupts channels and sets up teammates.
crunch.R: Re-Crunch repeats your last ability — repeat the uppercut for double crowd control or Left Crunch for extra burst.
crunch.Passive: Sequence matters: cast, punch, cast — every ability amplifies your next attack, and two casts arm a Turbo-enhanced ability.
crunch.LMB: Punch after every ability — the amplified hit and cooldown refund reward alternating cast, punch, cast.

serath.LMB: Keep attacking between abilities — the bonus magical on-hit damage adds up across her long duels.
serath.RMB: Use Chastise mid-attack-string: it applies on-hit effects at 100% effectiveness and resets your basic attack for a free extra swing.
serath.Q: Vanish onto a target to dodge danger while the 5 strikes land — if the target dies, you teleport immediately.
serath.E: Hover to dodge big hits, then dive up to 1350 units away — a gap-closer and a bait tool in one.
serath.R: Open committed fights with Heresy — the burning true-damage attacks plus speed reward using the full 7s.
serath.Passive: After a takedown, grab the visage — free Heresy and 65% off your basic cooldowns chains you into the next kill.

sparrow.Q: Drop the volley where enemies must stand — objectives and chokepoints — the 8 hits stack Relentless while slowing.
sparrow.E: Use the stealth window to reposition, then unload — the attack speed and every-second-hit bonus reward staying on one target.
sparrow.R: Save Inner Fire for lined-up fights: it pierces everything, crits, and the center arrow hits hardest.
sparrow.LMB: Keep shooting one target — with Relentless stacks, every basic attack adds bonus max-health damage.
sparrow.RMB: Charge the arrow fully — power peaks after 1s — and fire through stacked targets and terrain for maximum value.
sparrow.Passive: Focus fire — 8 Relentless stacks turn your basic attacks into bonus max-health damage, so don't switch targets casually.

yurei.RMB: Open with the three projectiles to spread Soul Rip, setting up Severance resets before you commit.
yurei.Q: Kick inside groups for area damage plus healing that grows with your missing health — cast it mid-air to leap.
yurei.E: Rush a Soul Ripped target to reset the cooldown and tear out their Soul — damaging the Soul hurts the host too.
yurei.R: Channel it in the middle of a fight: the pull-and-slam re-applies Soul Rip and resets Severance for a follow-up chain.
yurei.Passive: After every cast, spend the two ranged bouncing attacks before casting again — that rhythm is Yurei's whole damage output.
yurei.LMB: Melee swings are filler — lead with abilities so your empowered follow-up attacks fire from range instead.

feng-mao.LMB: Swing between ability casts — Feng Mao's damage comes from mixing glaive hits into his spins.
feng-mao.RMB: Dash through targets to open or to finish — a takedown refunds 80% of the cooldown, chaining you into the next play.
feng-mao.Q: Time the Spellshield against the enemy's key ability — blocking one doubles its passive power and speed for 5s.
feng-mao.E: Duel with Hamstring — it hits harder when only one target is struck, so isolate your opponent before spinning.
feng-mao.R: Hold Earth Shatter as the execute — killing a hero with it grants a free recast within 20s, snowballing fights.
feng-mao.Passive: Spread takedowns across different heroes — unique takedowns permanently bank penetration, and all your penetration is amplified by 40%.

narbash.E: Toggle to the moment: Speed to rotate and chase, Healing to sustain a poked lane.
narbash.LMB: Swing in once your stuns land — Narbash's clubs hit surprisingly hard at 95% scaling.
narbash.RMB: Thunk through minions at the enemy carry — the tiny hitbox punishes careless positioning with a stun of up to 1.3s.
narbash.Q: March! before engages and retreats — it briefly supercharges whichever song you're playing for the whole team.
narbash.R: Drum solo inside the enemy team: the stacking slow becomes a Mesmerize at 5 stacks and the finale knocks everyone up.
narbash.Passive: Fight in crowds — you gain power and both armors for every hero nearby, so grouped brawls literally make you tankier.

eden.LMB: Ranged sprays fast light rounds while melee ends in a heavy hit — pick the stance that fits the fight's range.
eden.RMB: Ranged: thrust away and land the empowered Railshot poke. Melee: dash-uppercut to pin a target inside your claws.
eden.Q: Ranged: pierce grouped enemies with the laser. Melee: the spins into the lightning strike are your all-in damage.
eden.E: Swap stances constantly — ranged grants bonus power, melee heals a share of hero damage — melee to brawl, ranged to poke.
eden.R: Ranged Limit Break bombards from above; melee lets you steer the strike zone — choose the form that fits the fight's shape.
eden.Passive: Keep damaging heroes to hold Heat — it decays after 3.5s quiet — and attack speed converts into more physical power.

neon.LMB: Shoot between casts — your dash empowers the next Jolt, so basic attacks are part of the combo, not filler.
neon.RMB: Dash then shoot: the empowered Jolt explodes and slows — Overclocked, you get a free second dash for outplays.
neon.Q: Angle L.I.N.X so it returns through heroes — the return trip deals true damage, and Overclocked adds a max-range pulse.
neon.E: Lob Data Burst into chokepoints — Overclocked it Mesmerizes as well as slows, turning poke into a fight-opening lockup.
neon.R: Final Thread Overclocks everything for 8s — chain all three empowered abilities, then recast for the missing-health bomb.
neon.Passive: Count your Threads: spend three cheap casts, then save the Overclocked ability for the moment the fight needs it.

countess.Passive: Land two ability hits within 4s to start the max-health bleed — your combo order exists to trigger Blood Tithe.
countess.LMB: Swing between spells inside fights — your burst opens kills and basic attacks close them.
countess.RMB: Spin in the middle of them — the healing jumps 450% against heroes, so multi-hero Blade Siphons sustain your dives.
countess.Q: Dash in, burst, and swap back to your Shadow within 3.5s — always know where your exit stands.
countess.E: Poke with Eventide through the wave before committing — it is your safe harass while dash cooldowns recover.
countess.R: Feast a target already carrying Haemorrhage — it deals 50% bonus damage and heals you for all of it.

howitzer.Passive: Cast abilities to rush Armed Salvo back — each cast cuts 5s — and spend the empowered shot on heroes.
howitzer.LMB: Keep shelling between spells — your cannon rounds keep you threatening while cooldowns cycle.
howitzer.RMB: Scatter the 11 bombs across chokepoints and objectives — the zone slows and re-slows anyone who fights inside it.
howitzer.Q: Charge the rocket fully when safe — damage climbs from 65-100% with charge time — and snipe grouped enemies from range.
howitzer.E: Keep Land Mine for self-peel: it knocks divers back with a 0.5s stun — or blast yourself away to escape.
howitzer.R: Ult from behind your frontline and keep painting the target — the missiles home to your marker, so track fleeing enemies.

ikra.LMB: Poke from range, and use it to pop your own Bubbles for free area damage.
ikra.RMB: Pop your amplified Bubble with Brine — it deals both damage instances at once — and last-hit with it for the bonus gold.
ikra.Q: Aim it at one hero: it stops on them and Suspends for 1.2s, giving you time to line up the Bubble combo.
ikra.E: Place the Bubble, wait 1.1s until it amplifies, then pop it — the damage and slow jump massively when you are patient.
ikra.R: Channel from behind walls — the Waterspout pierces them — and aim so the knock-up drops enemies into your team's follow-up.
ikra.Passive: Pick the Eternal category that fits the game — healing, anti-heal, or mobility each change how your Bubble combo plays.
